title: Boku no Hero Academia: More

alternative_titles.ja: 僕のヒーローアカデミア More

synopsis:
Years after their all-out war with villains and graduation from UA Academy, the former Class 1-A students have each found their calling within society. With the increased Quirk education all around Japan, Ochako Uraraka plays a pivotal part in ensuring the new generation of Quirk users grows up properly. Despite being satisfied with the status quo, Ochako is reminded by the shadow of Himiko Toga of something important she has forgotten in the midst of her work.

Meanwhile, Izuku Midoriya is the happiest he has ever been as a teacher at UA Academy. However, as Midoriya and Ochako take part in a gathering with their former classmates, they both realize what the missing piece in their lives has been.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
